blocks.text: had given Davenport the trust. He'd earned it through the weekend. That counted for something.
respected what Davenport had done. Different methods. Same direction.
said nothing about it. He carried the respect without naming it.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: I packed your bag. I packed mine. I didn't cancel the reservation because I knew you'd tell me not to.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Julian. What are we doing here?

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Davenport filed it as suspicious death. Tox is seventy-two hours. The group can't leave the county.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: We were supposed to leave today. I had plans. You had â€” well, you never have plans, but you had the absence of a murder investigation.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Fun can come after. There's a case that needs attention.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: You don't even know it's a case yet.

blocks.speaker: Julian Crane
blocks.content: Someone placed that glass. Someone went through that window. Someone in that house last night knew exactly what they were doing and was exactly where they needed to be all day so that nobody would think to look at them.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: And you're going to find them.

blocks.speaker: Mara Voss
blocks.content: Then I'll cancel the dinner reservation.
She said it like a woman who had already decided. She held the phone a beat longer before she put it down.

blocks.prompt: This is the moment everything changed. Who do you think did this?

options.label: Nadia Reyes. She was the still point of everything.
Cade Mercer. He's hiding something and he's scared.
Not enough yet. But the answer is in that house.
